info.headline: Severe Weather Warning for North East Pastoral forecast district
info.description:
HEAVY RAINFALL which may lead to FLASH FLOODING is forecast for parts of the North East Pastoral district today. Six-hourly rainfall totals between 50 and 80 mm are likely.
INTENSE RAINFALL is no longer expected, with broader conditions expected to ease during this afternoon.
Flood Watches and Warnings are current for the area. Please refer to https://www.bom.gov.au/weather-and-climate/warnings-and-alerts/ for more information. Locations which may be affected include Moomba, Innamincka, Arkaroola, the area east of Lake Frome, Mungeranie on the Birdsville Track and the Strzelecki Track south of Moomba.
